summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Auto Post feature. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with form submission, schedule CRUD operations, and sidebar navigation working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/auto-post/languages returns 200 with 3 language options (id, en, mixed)
GET /api/auto-post/schedules returns 200 with list of schedules
POST /api/auto-post/schedules creates schedule with valid account_id
POST /api/auto-post/schedules returns 404 for invalid account_id
PATCH /api/auto-post/schedules/{id} toggles active status correctly
PATCH /api/auto-post/schedules/{id} updates theme correctly
DELETE /api/auto-post/schedules/{id} deletes schedule successfully
DELETE /api/auto-post/schedules/{id} returns 404 for invalid id
GET /api/auto-post/history returns 200 with list
GET /api/auto-post/history respects limit parameter
Full CRUD flow (Create->Read->Update->Delete) works correctly
Existing test account (ff1fa2de-4069-44bb-9d11-81484c540e36) accessible
Auto Post page renders at /auto-post with all UI elements
Sidebar shows 'Auto Post' nav link with active state when on page
Form: account select dropdown works with logged-in accounts
Form: language select dropdown shows all 3 options
Form: theme input accepts text input
Form: time picker works correctly
Form: submit button creates schedule and shows success toast
Jadwal Aktif table displays created schedules with all columns
Toggle action (Aktif/Nonaktif badge) works correctly
Preview button present in action column
Post-now button present in action column
Delete button removes schedule and shows success toast
Sidebar navigation between Dashboard and Auto Post works
seed_data_creation: Test schedules created during testing were cleaned up after tests
test_credentials: No auth required. Test account ID: ff1fa2de-4069-44bb-9d11-81484c540e36, username: billyanggadewantara
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto Post feature fully tested. All CRUD operations for schedules work. POST /api/auto-post/schedules/{id}/post-now and POST /api/auto-post/preview endpoints were NOT tested as per instructions (they make real LLM API calls). The existing IG account billyanggadewantara is available for testing but is not logged in to Instagram.
notes: The /post-now and /preview endpoints were intentionally NOT tested as they make expensive LLM API calls via emergentintegrations. These endpoints use GPT-5.2 for caption generation and GPT Image 1 for image generation.
